name: Pteranodon

traits.name: Flyby
traits.text: The pteranodon doesn’t provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy’s reach.

text:
# Pteranodon

*Medium Beast (Dinosaur), Unaligned*

A gliding fish-snatching reptile of coastal cliffs.

### Actions

**Bite.** Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage.
